seoTitle: Kelvin vs Kembla Grange — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kelvin and Kembla Grange. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kelvin vs Kembla Grange: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kelvin and Kembla Grange.
heading: Kelvin vs Kembla Grange — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kelvin, New South Wales and Kembla Grange, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kelvin has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Kembla Grange (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kelvin or Kembla Grange safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kelvin has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Kembla Grange scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kelvin scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Kembla Grange scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kelvin or Kembla Grange?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kelvin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
